title: replay_run
description: Re-fire every invocation envelope from a captured chain via /v0/admin/invoke. Optional 'mutate' rewrites payload fields per envelope before re-firing — the building block for A/B and what-if tests.

dry_run.description: if true, return what would be re-fired without invoking

mutate.description: optional payload mutations applied to each invocation before re-fire

to_surface.description: only mutate envelopes targeting this surface

set.description: shallow merge into payload (top-level keys only)
